calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Nov-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Paul Sanderson-Cimino (415-354-6347; pscimino@baylegal.org) of Bay Area Legal Aid for Petitioner.
Wayne Snodgrass (Wayne.Snodgrass@sfcityatty.org) Deputy City Attorney for Respondent.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

RESPONDENTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, BOARD OF SUPERVISORS OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY, HUMAN SERVICES COMMISSION'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is taken under submission as of November 23, 2020 for court to consider proposed orders from both sides. Petitioner to submit a proposed order by November 24, 2020 to contestdept302tr@sftc.org. Respondent's proposed order is received by the court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
